refine (fix f n : cpInv (fst (cp n)) (snd (cp n)) = n :=
  match n with
  | 0 => eq_refl
  | S n' =>
    match cp n' as p return (cp n' = p -> cpInv (fst (cp (S n'))) (snd (cp (S n'))) = S n') with
    | (x, y) => fun H : cp n' = (x, y) =>
      match x return cpInv (fst (cp (S n'))) (snd (cp (S n'))) = S n' with
      | 0 => _
      | S x' => _
      end
    end (eq_refl (cp n'))
  end). all: simpl; unfold cpInv; simpl; try rewrite plus_n_O; rewrite plus_n_Sm; apply eq_S; pose proof (f n') as H1; rewrite H in H1; apply H1.
